title: SRS unit terminal arrangement
section: Driver assistance SRS airbags seat belts

rows: *1: Wires with instructions can be changed to any wiring color as specified by the manufacturer.
*2: TRW SRS units are connected to the data link coupler with a cord, but do not communicate with or control HDS.
When checking the manufacturer name of the SRS unit, use HDS to check the ECU manufacturer displayed in the data list.
*: Wiring with instructions can be changed to any manufacturer's wiring color.
When checking the manufacturer name of the SRS unit, use HDS to check the ECU manufacturer displayed in the data list.
